justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a range of options or proactively suggesting alternative solutions until later in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for single time slots on days that were already confirmed to be fully booked.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively offer a broader range of alternative dates or suggest different consultation types earlier in the conversation, leading to many unproductive turns.

overall_notes: The agent was unable to find any available appointments, and its negotiation strategy was not effective in helping the user find a solution quickly.
